use_case: 18 business case study simulations for Lo! Foods brand strategy research across sub-brands, channels, pricing, and consumer segments in Indian health food market.
notes: Real brand name used throughout. Interventions emerge dynamically from probing phase — not pre-set. All personas are India-grounded with Sarvam cultural layer enabled. B2B professional personas (P1-P4) run full 8-phase simulation including personal health beliefs.

target_segments.name: GP / Endocrinologist
target_segments.role: patient advisor and recommendation authority for diabetic patients
target_segments.notes: Full 8-phase simulation — personal health beliefs matter. Many Indian doctors are health-conscious themselves; some are diabetic. DiabeSmart credibility hinges on this persona's recommendation likelihood. Will not recommend without clinical evidence. Prescription recommendation is the gold standard trigger for C7/C8 purchase.
